_description: Canonical role/title taxonomy used by engines/intake/normalizers.py and engines/job/role_normalizer.py. Maps freeform titles to canonical categories. Structure: 'canonical' (dict of canonical_title -> {category, adjacent_categories (list), default_skills (list), typical_salary_band_by_country (dict country_code -> {min, max, currency})}), and 'aliases' (flat dict of lowercase_variant -> canonical_title).
_status: stub — populate with 30-50 canonical tech/business roles + 200+ aliases
